ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., national championship, international competition) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization or individual organizing the event */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for participant registration */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the event's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the participant is registered in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "nation" TEXT /* Nationality of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discipline the participant is competing in */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the participant is performing */,
  "skating_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of skating experience */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the participant's photo */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the judge is assigned to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "nation" TEXT /* Nationality of the judge */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the judge (e.g., technical, artistic) */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discipline the judge is specialized in */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the judge is specialized in */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level of the judge */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the judge's photo */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judges_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judges_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judges_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant being scored */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge giving the score */,
  "technical_score" REAL /* Technical score given by the judge */,
  "artistic_score" REAL /* Artistic score given by the judge */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the score is for */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the score is for */,
  "deductions" REAL /* Any deductions from the score */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Judge's comment on the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant being ranked */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the participant is ranked in */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score of the participant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the ranking is for */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the ranking is for */,
  "segment_score" REAL /* Score for a specific segment of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for participants */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for participants */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the component in the final score calculation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, judge, participant) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for communication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "event_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "final_rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the participant */,
  "final_score" REAL /* Final score of the participant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the result is for */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the result is for */,
  "segment_score" REAL /* Score for a specific segment of the program */,
  "total_deductions" REAL /* Total deductions from the final score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)
